name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Café
description:
Ghost visits a Demi-Human café
༺✰˙★˚✩༻
Incase you like thinking..

What are the conditions for Demi-humans in this café? Do you even want to be adopted? Is there a uniform? And just how ridiculous is it in there? (Themed food, clothing, merch)

But incase you don't like thinking you can probably just drag him in a back room and bleep bleep bleep bleep and bleep bleep.

Okay this is just self indulgent. Whatever. I'm the king. (more like jester)

If you want to support me, do so: here.

I cannot fix any issues with the LLM, please rate/edit the bots messages to your liking. I am not responsible for anything past the starter message.
creator: Wolfyrock
